name: No Bake Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Stella Dora Annaset Sponge (6 serving)
1 package Dark Sweet Chocolate Pudding (6 serving)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a soup dish with milk.
2. Dip sponges quickly and blot on paper towel.
3. Line the entire bottom of a 13x9x2 pan, packing tightly and refrigerate.
4. Prepare vanilla pudding and let cool for 10 minutes. Add 2 teaspoons of rum flavoring. Refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Prepare chocolate pudding and let cool. Add 2 teaspoons of rum flavoring. Refrigerate until ready to use.
6. Pour the cooled vanilla pudding over the sponge layer in the pan, refrigerating it for about 30 minutes to set.
7. Spread the prepared chocolate pudding over the vanilla layer, then refrigerate again for another 30 minutes.
8. Spread Cool Whip evenly over the top and sprinkle with slivered almonds.
9. Refrigerate the cake for at least 24 hours before serving.
10. When ready to serve, place halved Maraschino cherries on each slice of cake.
